headline: RSG Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Pricing & Margin Gains
summary: Republic Services tops Q1 EPS and revenue estimates as pricing and cost discipline lift the adjusted EBITDA margin to 32.1% despite volume drag.

headline: Nasdaq Tops 29,000 Records, Micron Soars 13%: Stock Market Today
summary: Nasdaq jumps 1.6% to record highs Friday as semiconductor rally and stronger-than-expected April payrolls overshadow ongoing Strait of Hormuz tensions.

headline: Republic Services beats headwinds to deliver growth in Q1
summary: The company grew key financial metrics despite headwinds from commodity prices, fuel costs and extreme weather in the first quarter. Executives said the environmental services business would also strengthen as the year goes on.

raw.headline: Republic Services beats headwinds to deliver growth in Q1
